ontology.foodon_gap_note: No exact FoodOn entry for chocolate ganache bun; 'sweet bun' (FOODON_03315091) is the closest defensible parent class. Ganache filling and cocoa topping are product-specific elaborations not captured in FoodOn.
ontology.foodex2_description: Bread and rolls — sweet bread / bun (FoodEx2 level 2 category A000N); used as closest defensible FoodEx2 anchor for a filled sweet bun product.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 does not have a specific code for chocolate ganache bun; A000N (sweet bread/bun) is the closest defensible category.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No SNOMED CT clinical food concept maps specifically to chocolate ganache bun; omitted to preserve ontology honesty.

preparation_method: topped with coffee Mexican crispy sauce

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard chocolate ganache bun weighs approximately 80 g, representing a typical single-serve portion as sold in Singaporean bakeries.

nutrient_source.title: Chocolate Cake / Chocolate Bun — HPB Singapore Foodo Nutrient Database; supplemented with USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy entry for 'Bread, sweet, enriched' (FDC ID 168012) for saturated fat and micronutrient estimation.
nutrient_source.organization: Health Promotion Board Singapore (HPB) / USDA Agricultural Research Service
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: The HPB Foodo database entry for this specific product (G00010096) provides the primary per-100g macro values as recorded: energy 42 kcal, protein 0 g, fat 0.25 g, carbohydrate 10.36 g, sugar 9.94 g, sodium 3 mg, dietary fibre 0 g. These values are anomalously low for a baked sweet bun (expected ~300–380 kcal/100g) and are preserved as-reported from the canonical HPB source per Veritas policy. Saturated fat, monounsaturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, and selected micronutrients not reported by HPB for this entry are supplemented from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy 'Bread, sweet, enriched' as an analogous estimate and are flagged accordingly. The input food_group 'Beverages / Coffee' is corrected to 'Snacks / Sweet buns and pastries' based on product description.

gi_source.title: Glycemic Index of Sweet Breads and Buns — analogous estimate based on 'Bread, white, enriched' and 'Chocolate cake' entries in the University of Sydney GI Database; GI ~65 used as central estimate for refined-flour sweet bun with chocolate filling.
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for Cacao Rich Dark Chocolate Ganache Bun. GI of 65 is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database entries for white enriched bread (GI ~70) and chocolate cake (GI ~38), weighted toward the bun base as the dominant component. Carbohydrate per serving used for GL calculation is based on HPB-reported values: 10.36 g/100g × 0.80 (80 g serving) = 8.29 g available carbohydrate; GL = 65 × 8.29 / 100 = 5.4. Note: HPB-reported carbohydrate values are anomalously low for a bun product; actual GL at realistic carbohydrate content (~45 g/100g) would be substantially higher (~23).

hypertension.key_factor: Added sugar with negligible potassium and zero dietary fibre; insulin-mediated sodium retention risk
hypertension.guidance: Although sodium is very low at 3 mg/100g per HPB data, the high added-sugar content (9.94 g/100g as reported; likely higher in the actual product) combined with zero dietary fibre and negligible potassium (5 mg/100g) promotes insulin-mediated sodium retention and endothelial dysfunction per AHA 2018 guidelines; individuals with hypertension should limit consumption and verify actual nutrition values from the product label.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Refined flour base with added sugar, zero dietary fibre, and estimated medium-to-high glycaemic index
type2_diabetes.guidance: The refined wheat flour and chocolate ganache filling produce a medium-to-high glycaemic response (estimated GI ~65); zero dietary fibre means no glucose absorption modulation; individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit this product, and note that HPB-reported carbohydrate values (10.36 g/100g) are anomalously low for a baked bun — actual carbohydrate content is likely 40–50 g/100g, substantially increasing glycaemic load.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat from butter and cream ganache; added sugar; ultra-processed baked product
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: The butter-enriched dough and chocolate ganache filling contribute saturated fat (estimated ~0.08 g/100g at HPB-reported values, but likely 8–12 g/100g at realistic product composition), which raises LDL cholesterol risk; combined with added sugar and ultra-processed formulation, individuals with cardiovascular disease should treat this as an occasional indulgence and verify actual fat content from the product packaging.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Cacao Rich Dark Chocolate Ganache Bun is a Singaporean artisan bakery product made using the sponge dough method, which produces a characteristically soft, pillowy texture. The enriched butter dough is made from wheat flour, cocoa powder, sugar, salt, and butter. The bun is topped with a coffee-flavoured Mexican crispy sauce (similar to a conchas-style topping), piped generously with rich dark chocolate ganache, and finished with premium pistachios for a nutty aroma and textural contrast. The flavour profile combines the bitterness of dark cacao and coffee with the sweetness of the ganache and the richness of butter, making it a premium indulgence item. Nutritionally, the HPB-recorded values (42 kcal, 10.36 g carbohydrate, 9.94 g sugar, 0.25 g fat per 100g) are anomalously low for a baked enriched bun and likely reflect a data entry error; realistic values for this product category are approximately 300–380 kcal, 40–50 g carbohydrate, 10–18 g fat, and 8–15 g sugar per 100g. Zero dietary fibre and negligible potassium are consistent with a refined-flour product. The product contains major allergens including gluten, dairy, eggs, and tree nuts (pistachios). It is not suitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes or following low-sugar diets, and should be consumed in moderation by those with hypertension or cardiovascular disease concerns.

confidence_reason: The HPB Foodo database is an approved primary source for Singapore food records, and the cr_id G00010096 is a canonical HPB entry. However, the per-100g nutrient values (42 kcal, 0 g protein, 0.25 g fat) are internally inconsistent with the described product — a butter-enriched baked bun with chocolate ganache and pistachios. These values are preserved as-reported per Veritas policy but are flagged as likely erroneous. Confidence is set to medium because the food identity is well-established but the nutrient data integrity is questionable.
notes: ZERO MACRO JUSTIFICATION (g4): protein_g is reported as 0.0 g/100g per HPB Foodo canonical entry G00010096. This value is anomalous for a wheat-flour butter bun (expected ~6–9 g/100g protein) and is preserved as-reported from the approved source. The zero protein value is documented here as 'confirmed zero per HPB source' but is flagged as a likely data entry error — not naturally zero. Fat_g is reported as 0.25 g/100g, which is also anomalously low for a butter-enriched ganache bun (expected ~12–18 g/100g). NEGATIVE SENTINEL VALUES (g3): trans_fat_g set to -1.0 — not reported in HPB Foodo entry G00010096 or USDA SR Legacy sweet bread entry. vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, water_g set to -1.0 — detailed vitamin and mineral panel not available in HPB Foodo for this entry; USDA SR Legacy sweet bread entry does not provide a complete match for all micronutrients in this specific product formulation. DATA ANOMALY FLAG: The input record was miscategorised as food_group 'Beverages / Coffee' — corrected to 'Snacks / Sweet buns and pastries' based on product description. The per-100g energy value of 42 kcal is consistent with a beverage (e.g., a coffee drink) rather than a baked bun, strongly suggesting the HPB source entry may have been misassigned or contains a data entry error. All nutrient values are preserved as-reported from the canonical HPB source per Veritas policy; downstream users should verify against product packaging. SATURATED FAT: 0.08 g/100g is an analogous estimate from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy 'Bread, sweet, enriched' (FDC ID 168012), proportionally scaled to the HPB-reported fat value of 0.25 g/100g; this is not the realistic saturated fat for this product at actual composition.
